title: Sarepta Therapeutics Stock Forecast and Analyst Predictions
text:
Comprehensive stock forecast analysis for Sarepta Therapeutics reveals mixed outlook reflecting recent challenges offset by long-term growth potential from ELEVIDYS and pipeline programs.

Current Price and Valuation: Current SRPT trading price reflects significant volatility from recent FDA regulatory actions and ELEVIDYS demand concerns. The stock trades at a discount to historical highs achieved in 2024 following the successful label expansion.

Analyst Price Targets: 25 analysts covering SRPT maintain an average price target of $25.24, implying 45% upside from certain levels. Price targets range from $12 (bear case) to $35+ (bull case), reflecting wide dispersion of outcomes.

Rating Distribution: 8 Buy ratings, 27 Hold ratings, 10 Sell ratings. The Hold consensus reflects cautious sentiment regarding near-term execution risks offset by longer-term opportunity.

Earnings Forecasts: 2026 EPS estimate: $1.00. 2025 EPS higher than 2026 due to ELEVIDYS demand normalization. Revenue declining at 11% per annum reflecting management guidance cut. Earnings growing at 51.2% per annum reflecting margin expansion and leverage.

Revenue Outlook: 2025 guidance: $2.9-3.1 billion (70% growth). 2026 guidance: $1.2-1.4 billion (60% decline). This decline reflects label restrictions and market hesitancy toward ELEVIDYS. Recovery expected in 2027 and beyond as safety concerns ease.

Catalysts: ENDEAVOR Cohort 8 trial results for non-ambulatory indication. SRP-9003 BLA approval for LGMD2E. International ELEVIDYS approvals. Pipeline advancement in LGMD programs. Reaccumulation by institutional investors at lower prices.

Long-term View: Despite near-term headwinds, analysts see significant long-term potential if ELEVIDYS can overcome safety perceptions and expand to broader patient populations.
